response.justification: Bogdan is a deeply experienced full-stack engineer with 25+ years of shipping software, strong TypeScript/Node.js depth, and directly relevant recent work on MCP code generators and agentic-workflow frameworks — a rare and valuable niche for this role. However, the role requires 8+ years building production AI-driven solutions, and his AI exposure appears to be a recent slice of his current position. There is no evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or Python, and his cloud experience is incidental rather than architectural. He could be a strong conversation if the AI-infrastructure work runs deeper than the resume shows, but on paper he misses several hard requirements.
strengths: Hands-on MCP (Model Context Protocol) code-generator and agentic-workflow framework experience at current role
25+ years of full-stack engineering with strong TypeScript/Node.js and staff-level tenure
Proven mentorship and customer-facing background through consulting, workshops, and multi-day courses
concerns: No demonstrated RAG, vector database, or LLM evaluation/observability experience — core required qualifications
AI-related work appears recent and narrow, falling well short of the required 8+ years building production AI solutions
Python is absent from his skill set, and cloud platform experience (brief AWS CDK use) is not at AI-system design level

key_factors.factor: Missing RAG/vector DB and LLM evaluation expertise
Falls short of 8+ years production AI experience
